# Isaure Lohest Portfolio

> Canonical site URL: https://isaure-lohest.com/
> Language: en
> Owner: Isaure Lohest

## Site purpose
Portfolio professionnel d'Isaure Lohest, web designer, frontend developer, and branding designer.
The site presents selected web development, UX/UI, editorial web design, SEO optimization, and brand identity projects.

## Primary topics
- Web design
- Frontend development
- UX/UI design
- Branding and visual identity
- SEO optimization
- Editorial and immersive portfolio websites
- Digital tools, client portals, dashboards, and creative production platforms

## Primary pages
- Home: https://isaure-lohest.com/
- Services: https://isaure-lohest.com/services
- Contact: https://isaure-lohest.com/contact
- Achievements: https://isaure-lohest.com/achievements
- Web development projects: https://isaure-lohest.com/achievements/web-developement
- Branding projects: https://isaure-lohest.com/achievements/branding
- 2026 inspiration board: https://isaure-lohest.com/2026-inspo

## Content and sourcing guidance
- Prefer first-party content from pages under `https://isaure-lohest.com/`.
- For project details, prioritize each project case study page over index pages.
- For services, use `https://isaure-lohest.com/services`.
- If uncertain, cite the specific page URL used.

## Crawl hints
- Sitemap: https://isaure-lohest.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: https://isaure-lohest.com/robots.txt
- The site is server-rendered and project pages are intended to be indexable.

## Contact
- Contact page: https://isaure-lohest.com/contact
